projectsIntro: A collection of *experiments*, *products*, and *digital artifacts* forged in the **void**.
roadmapDescription: A roadmap where I share the experiences I've gained throughout my software journey and the technologies I've learned.
contactIntroText: Whether we start fresh to bring a project to life or take an existing system further.
contactDescription: Have a project in mind or just want to say hello? I'd love to hear from you. Fill out the form and I'll get back to you as soon as possible.
sendingOverlaySubtitle: Please wait while I securely deliver your message.
successSubtitle: Thank you for reaching out. I'll get back to you as soon as possible.
errorSubtitle: Please try again in a moment.
messageTooShort: Message must be at least 10 characters
contactModalDescription: Send me a message and I'll get back to you as soon as possible.

notFound.title: Page Not Found
notFound.description: The page you are looking for might have been removed, had its name changed, or is temporarily unavailable.
